reviews.comment:
Excelente atención recibida de hoy en aca de belgrano caba por la sta ROCIO MEDINA BAEZ  y el sr Frank vaquero.
Por favoracercar mi comentario a dichas personas y distribuirlos por sus virtudes
Godio Philip Alejandro

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service received today at the Belgrano branch in Buenos Aires from Ms. Rocío Medina Báez and Mr. Frank Vaquero.

Please forward my comment to them and share it because of their positive feedback.
Godio Philip Alejandro

reviews.comment:
Después de las 5 de la mañana no vengan siempre tienen un problema o te dejan esperando por el cambio de personal. Trato de evitar e ir al axion que esta a dos cuadras y atienden mucho mejor

(Translated by Google)
Don't come after 5 a.m. They always have a problem or leave you waiting for the staff change. I try to avoid it and go to the Axion two blocks away; the service is much better.
